info.description: This is the API definition for Ideogram AI.
info.title: Ideogram - OpenAPI 3.0

tags.description: All things related to generating content.
tags.name: generate

tags.description: Content related to managing API account and API access
tags.name: manage

tags.description: Operations related to understanding visual content
tags.name: vision

tags.description: Operations and endpoints designed for doing internal testing. Not intended to be called outside a test environment.
tags.name: internal-testing

tags.description: Operations related to managing custom models
tags.name: models

tags.description: Operations related to Ideogram 4.0 image generation
tags.name: v4-generation

get.description: Lists all datasets for the authenticated user

post.description: Creates a new dataset

requestBody.description: Request to create a new dataset

post.description: Start training a custom model from a dataset. The dataset must contain at least 5 images. Returns the model ID and training status.

requestBody.description: Training configuration

post.summary: Train a model from a dataset

post.description: Upload image assets to a dataset for model training. Accepts individual images (JPEG, PNG, WebP), optional .txt caption sidecar files, and/or ZIP archives containing images and captions.

Describe an image.

Supported image formats include JPEG, PNG, and WebP.

code-samples.code:
curl -X POST https://api.ideogram.ai/describe \
  -H "Api-Key: <apiKey>" \
  -H "Content-Type: multipart/form-data" \
  -F image_file=@<file1>

post.description:
Edit a given image synchronously using the provided mask. The mask indicates which part of the image
should be edited, while the prompt and chosen style type can further guide the edit.

Supported image formats include JPEG, PNG, and WebP.

Images links are available for a limited period of time; if you would like to keep the image, you must download it.

requestBody.description: A request to edit an image with Ideogram.

401.description: Not authorized to generate an image.

422.description: Prompt or Initial Image failed the safety checks.

post.description:
Generates images synchronously based on a given prompt and optional parameters.

Images links are available for a limited period of time; if you would like to keep the image, you must download it.

requestBody.description: A request to generate an image with Ideogram.

401.description: Not authorized to generate an image.

post.description:
Runs automated evaluation of multiple LLM models and system prompts for magic prompt generation. 
Generates images using large batches of user prompt inputs. Internal use only (feature flagged).

requestBody.description: A request for batch magic prompt evalution.

200.description: Batch magic prompt evalution completed successfully.

401.description: Not authorized for batch magic prompt evalution.

get.description: Lists custom models for the authenticated user. Use the `scope` parameter to control which models are returned. `owned` (default) returns models created by the user. `shared` returns models shared with the user's organization via the model registry, excluding the user's own models.

parameters.description: Controls which models are returned. `owned` returns models created by the authenticated user. `shared` returns models shared with the user's organization via the model registry.
parameters.name: scope

parameters.description: Filter by model status. Only applies when scope is `owned`. Example: `?status=TRAINING&status=COMPLETED`
parameters.name: status

get.description: Get detailed information about a specific custom model, including training run history for owned models. The user must either own the model or the model must be shared with the user's organization via the model registry. Returns 404 if the model is not found or not accessible.

post.description:
Reframe a square image to a chosen resolution. The supported image formats include JPEG, PNG, and WebP.

Image links are available for a limited period of time; if you would like to keep the image, you must download it.

requestBody.description: A request to reframe an image in a new resolution.

401.description: Not authorized to generate an image.

422.description: Prompt or Image failed the safety checks.

post.description:
Remix provided images synchronously based on a given prompt and optional parameters.

Input images are cropped to the chosen aspect ratio before being remixed.

Supported image formats include JPEG, PNG, and WebP.

Images links are available for a limited period of time; if you would like to keep the image, you must download it.

requestBody.description: A request to remix a provided image with Ideogram. Input images are cropped to the chosen aspect ratio before being remixed.

403.description: Not authorized to generate an image.

422.description: Prompt or provided image failed safety check.

post.description:
Upscale provided images synchronously with an optional prompt.

Supported image formats include JPEG, PNG, and WebP.

Images links are available for a limited period of time; if you would like to keep the image, you must download it.

requestBody.description: A request to upscale a provided image with Ideogram.

403.description: Not authorized to generate an image.

422.description: Prompt or provided image failed safety check.

code-samples.code:
curl -X POST https://api.ideogram.ai/upscale \
  -H "Api-Key: <apiKey>" \
  -H "Content-Type: multipart/form-data" \
  -F image_file=@<file1> \
  -F image_request='{
      "resemblance": 55,
      "detail": 90
    }'

post.description:
Edit a given image synchronously using the provided mask with Ideogram 3.0. The mask indicates which part of the image
should be edited, while the prompt and chosen style can further guide the edit.

Supported image formats include JPEG, PNG, and WebP.

Images links are available for a limited period of time; if you would like to keep the image, you must download it.

requestBody.description: A request to edit an image with Ideogram 3.0.

401.description: Not authorized to generate an image.

422.description: Prompt or Initial Image failed the safety checks.

request.prompt: A photo of a cat wearing a hat.

data.prompt: A photo of a cat wearing a hat.

code-samples.code:
curl -X POST https://api.ideogram.ai/v1/ideogram-v3/edit \
  -H "Api-Key: <apiKey>" \
  -H "Content-Type: multipart/form-data" \
  -F image=@<file1> \
  -F mask=@<file1> \
  -F prompt="A photo of a cat wearing a hat." \
  -F rendering_speed="DEFAULT"

post.description:
Generates images synchronously based on a given prompt and optional parameters using the Ideogram 3.0 model.

Images links are available for a limited period of time; if you would like to keep the image, you must download it.

requestBody.description: A request to generate an image with Ideogram 3.0.

401.description: Not authorized to generate an image.

request.prompt: A photo of a cat sleeping on a couch.

data.prompt: A photo of a cat sleeping on a couch.

code-samples.code:
curl -X POST https://api.ideogram.ai/v1/ideogram-v3/generate \
  -H "Api-Key: <apiKey>" \
  -H "Content-Type: multipart/form-data" \
  -F prompt="A photo of a cat sleeping on a couch." \
  -F rendering_speed="TURBO"

post.description:
Generates a design synchronously from a text prompt using the Ideogram 3.0 model, then detects and corrects text layers within the generated image.

The response includes the generated image URL along with detected text layers (with font, size, color, position) and image asset layers.

Images links are available for a limited period of time; if you would like to keep the image, you must download it.

requestBody.description: A request to generate a design with Ideogram 3.0.

200.description: Design(s) generated successfully with text correction.

401.description: Not authorized to generate an image.

post.summary: Generate a design from a text prompt with text detection and correction

post.description:
Generates images with transparent background synchronously based on a given prompt and optional parameters using
the Ideogram 3.0 model. Images will be generated using maximum supported resolution at the specified aspect ratio
to allow best results with upscaler. The selected resolution is written to the response, not the upscaled final
resolution.

Images links are available for a limited period of time; if you would like to keep the image, you must download it.

requestBody.description: A request to generate an image with transparent background using Ideogram 3.0, with optional upscaling.

401.description: Not authorized to generate an image.

code-samples.code:
curl -X POST https://api.ideogram.ai/v1/ideogram-v3/generate-transparent \
  -H "Api-Key: <apiKey>" \
  -H "Content-Type: multipart/form-data" \
  -F prompt="A logo for Ideogram Coffee." \
  -F rendering_speed="TURBO"

post.description:
Deprecated: Use /v1/ideogram-v3/generate-design for text-to-design or /v1/ideogram-v3/layerize-design for image-to-design.

Generates graphics synchronously based on a given prompt and optional parameters using the Ideogram 3.0 model, with text detection and correction capabilities.

Images links are available for a limited period of time; if you would like to keep the image, you must download it.

requestBody.description: A request to generate a graphic with Ideogram 3.0.

200.description: Graphic(s) generated successfully with text correction.

401.description: Not authorized to generate an image.

post.summary: Generate graphics with Ideogram 3.0 and text correction

code-samples.code:
curl -X POST https://api.ideogram.ai/v1/ideogram-v3/graphic \
  -H "Api-Key: <apiKey>" \
  -H "Content-Type: multipart/form-data" \
  -F prompt="A birthday card saying 'Happy Birthday'" \
  -F rendering_speed="TURBO"

post.description:
Processes an existing flat graphic image to detect and correct text layers without generating a new image from scratch.

The uploaded image is analyzed for text content, which is then removed and returned as structured text layers with font matching, sizing, and color information.

Supported image formats include JPEG, PNG, and WebP (max size 10MB).

Images links are available for a limited period of time; if you would like to keep the image, you must download it.

requestBody.description: A request to layerize an existing flat graphic image.

200.description: Design layerized successfully with text correction.

401.description: Not authorized to generate an image.

post.summary: Layerize an existing flat graphic image with text detection and correction

post.description:
Analyzes an image to detect text regions, then returns each detected text block with its position, content, font information, and styling.

The response includes a text-erased base image (background with all text removed) and a flat list of detected text blocks.

Supported image formats include JPEG, PNG, and WebP (max size 10MB).

Image links are available for a limited period of time; if you would like to keep the image, you must download it.

requestBody.description: A request to detect and extract text layers from an image.

200.description: Text layers detected and extracted successfully.

post.summary: Detect and extract text layers from an image

post.description:
Reframe a square image to a chosen resolution with Ideogram 3.0. The supported image formats include JPEG, PNG, and WebP.

Image links are available for a limited period of time; if you would like to keep the image, you must download it.

requestBody.description: A request to reframe an image in a new resolution.

401.description: Not authorized to generate an image.

422.description: Prompt or Image failed the safety checks.

code-samples.code:
curl -X POST https://api.ideogram.ai/v1/ideogram-v3/reframe \
  -H "Api-Key: <apiKey>" \
  -H "Content-Type: multipart/form-data" \
  -F image=@<file1> \
  -F resolution="512x1536"

post.description:
Remix provided images synchronously based on a given prompt and optional parameters with the Ideogram 3.0 model.

Input images are cropped to the chosen aspect ratio before being remixed.

Supported image formats include JPEG, PNG, and WebP.

Images links are available for a limited period of time; if you would like to keep the image, you must download it.

requestBody.description: A request to remix an image with Ideogram 3.0.

403.description: Not authorized to generate an image.

422.description: Prompt or provided image failed safety check.

code-samples.code:
curl -X POST https://api.ideogram.ai/v1/ideogram-v3/remix \
  -H "Api-Key: <apiKey>" \
  -H "Content-Type: multipart/form-data" \
  -F image=@<file1> \
  -F prompt="A photo of a cat" \
  -F rendering_speed="TURBO"

post.description:
Replace the background of a given image synchronously using a prompt with Ideogram 3.0. The foreground subject
will be identified and kept, while the background is replaced based on the prompt and chosen style.
Supported image formats include JPEG, PNG, and WebP.
Images links are available for a limited period of time; if you would like to keep the image, you must download it.

requestBody.description: A request to replace the background of an image with Ideogram 3.0.

401.description: Not authorized to generate an image.

422.description: Prompt or Initial Image failed the safety checks.

request.prompt: Add a forest in the background

data.prompt: Add a forest in the background

code-samples.code:
curl -X POST https://api.ideogram.ai/v1/ideogram-v3/replace-background \
  -H "Api-Key: <apiKey>" \
  -H "Content-Type: multipart/form-data" \
  -F image=@<file1> \
  -F prompt="Add a forest in the background"

post.description:
Performs virtual clothing try-on by automatically segmenting the clothing in the provided image
and replacing it based on the prompt. The user provides an image and an optional prompt describing
the desired clothing change (e.g., "change his shirt to a pink shirt").

Supported image formats include JPEG, PNG, and WebP.

Images links are available for a limited period of time; if you would like to keep the image, you must download it.

requestBody.description: A request to perform virtual try-on with Ideogram 3.0.

401.description: Not authorized to generate an image.

422.description: Prompt or provided image failed safety check, or clothing segmentation failed.

request.prompt: Change his shirt to a pink shirt

data.prompt: Change his shirt to a pink shirt

code-samples.code:
curl -X POST https://api.ideogram.ai/v1/ideogram-v3/try-on \
  -H "Api-Key: <apiKey>" \
  -H "Content-Type: multipart/form-data" \
  -F image=@<file1> \
  -F prompt="Change his shirt to a pink shirt" \
  -F rendering_speed="DEFAULT"

post.description:
Generates images synchronously using the Ideogram 4.0 model.

Images links are available for a limited period of time; if you would like to keep the image, you must download it.

requestBody.description: A request to generate an image with Ideogram 4.0.

prompt.description: The text prompt for image generation.

DescribeResponse.description: The response for a describe request encapsulates a list of descriptions.

descriptions.text: A meticulously illustrated cat with striped patterns, sitting upright. The cat's eyes are a captivating shade of yellow, and it appears to be gazing intently at something. The background consists of abstract, swirling patterns in shades of black, white, and beige, creating an almost fluid or wavy appearance. The cat is positioned in the foreground, with the background elements fading into the distance, giving a sense of depth to the image.

descriptions.description: A collection of descriptions for given content.

DescribeResponse.title: DescribeResponse

image_file.description: An image binary (max size 10MB); only JPEG, WebP and PNG formats are supported at this time.
An image binary (max size 10MB); only JPEG, WebP and PNG formats are supported at this time.

mask.description: A black and white image of the same size as the image being edited (max size 10MB). Black regions in the mask should match up with the regions of the image that you would like to edit; only JPEG, WebP and PNG formats are supported at this time.

prompt.description: The prompt used to describe the edited result.
prompt.example: A serene tropical beach scene. Dominating the foreground are tall palm trees with lush green leaves, standing tall against a backdrop of a sandy beach. The beach leads to the azure waters of the sea, which gently kisses the shoreline. In the distance, there is an island or landmass with a silhouette of what appears to be a lighthouse or tower. The sky above is painted with fluffy white clouds, some of which are tinged with hues of pink and orange, suggesting either a sunrise or sunset.

image_request.prompt: A serene tropical beach scene. Dominating the foreground are tall palm trees with lush green leaves, standing tall against a backdrop of a sandy beach. The beach leads to the azure waters of the sea, which gently kisses the shoreline. In the distance, there is an island or landmass with a silhouette of what appears to be a lighthouse or tower. The sky above is painted with fluffy white clouds, some of which are tinged with hues of pink and orange, suggesting either a sunrise or sunset.

prompt.description: The prompt to use to generate the image.

seed.description: Random seed. Set for reproducible generation.
seed.title: Seed

negative_prompt.description:
Description of what to exclude from an image. Descriptions in the prompt take precedence
to descriptions in the negative prompt.

style_codes.description: A list of 8 character hexadecimal codes representing the style of the image. Cannot be used in conjunction with style_reference_images or style_type.

custom_model_uri.description:
A custom model URI in the format model/<model_name>/version/<version_name>. 
When provided, the model version and style will be resolved from this URI, and style_type is not required.

style_reference_images.description: A set of images to use as style references (maximum total size 10MB across all style references). The images should be in JPEG, PNG or WebP format.

character_reference_images.description: Generations with character reference are subject to the character reference pricing. A set of images to use as character references (maximum total size 10MB across all character references), currently only supports 1 character reference image. The images should be in JPEG, PNG or WebP format.

character_reference_images_mask.description: Optional masks for character reference images. When provided, must match the number of character_reference_images. Each mask should be a grayscale image of the same dimensions as the corresponding character reference image. The images should be in JPEG, PNG or WebP format.

prompt.description: The prompt to use to generate the graphic.

seed.description: Random seed. Set for reproducible generation.
seed.title: Seed

negative_prompt.description:
Description of what to exclude from a graphic. Descriptions in the prompt take precedence
to descriptions in the negative prompt.

style_codes.description: A list of 8 character hexadecimal codes representing the style of the image. Cannot be used in conjunction with style_reference_images or style_type.

custom_model_uri.description:
A custom model URI in the format model/<model_name>/version/<version_name>. 
When provided, the model version and style will be resolved from this URI, and style_type is not required.

flat_graphic_image.description: An existing flat graphic image to process for text detection and correction without generating a new image. When provided, image generation is bypassed. The image should be in JPEG, PNG or WebP format (max size 10MB).

font_file_h1.description: Custom font file for H1 (heading) text. Supported formats .ttf, .otf, .woff, .woff2 (max 5MB). Takes priority over font_name_h1.

font_name_h1.description: Font name from the available font library for H1 text. Ignored if font_file_h1 is provided.

font_file_h2.description: Custom font file for H2 (subheading) text. Supported formats .ttf, .otf, .woff, .woff2 (max 5MB). Takes priority over font_name_h2.

font_name_h2.description: Font name from the available font library for H2 text. Ignored if font_file_h2 is provided.

font_file_body.description: Custom font file for body text. Supported formats .ttf, .otf, .woff, .woff2 (max 5MB). Takes priority over font_name_body.

font_name_body.description: Font name from the available font library for body text. Ignored if font_file_body is provided.

font_file_small.description: Custom font file for small/caption text. Supported formats .ttf, .otf, .woff, .woff2 (max 5MB). Takes priority over font_name_small.

font_name_small.description: Font name from the available font library for small text. Ignored if font_file_small is provided.

style_reference_images.description: A set of images to use as style references (maximum total size 10MB across all style references). The images should be in JPEG, PNG or WebP format.

reference_asset_images.description: A set of asset images (e.g., logos, icons) to use as references for detection and replacement (maximum 10 images). The images should be in JPEG, PNG or WebP format.

prompt.description: The prompt to use to generate the design.

seed.description: Random seed. Set for reproducible generation.
seed.title: Seed

negative_prompt.description:
Description of what to exclude from a design. Descriptions in the prompt take precedence
to descriptions in the negative prompt.

style_codes.description: A list of 8 character hexadecimal codes representing the style of the image. Cannot be used in conjunction with style_reference_images or style_type.

custom_model_uri.description:
A custom model URI in the format model/<model_name>/version/<version_name>. 
When provided, the model version and style will be resolved from this URI, and style_type is not required.

font_file_h1.description: Custom font file for H1 (heading) text. Supported formats .ttf, .otf, .woff, .woff2 (max 5MB). Takes priority over font_name_h1.

font_name_h1.description: Font name from the available font library for H1 text. Ignored if font_file_h1 is provided.

font_file_h2.description: Custom font file for H2 (subheading) text. Supported formats .ttf, .otf, .woff, .woff2 (max 5MB). Takes priority over font_name_h2.

font_name_h2.description: Font name from the available font library for H2 text. Ignored if font_file_h2 is provided.

font_file_body.description: Custom font file for body text. Supported formats .ttf, .otf, .woff, .woff2 (max 5MB). Takes priority over font_name_body.

font_name_body.description: Font name from the available font library for body text. Ignored if font_file_body is provided.

font_file_small.description: Custom font file for small/caption text. Supported formats .ttf, .otf, .woff, .woff2 (max 5MB). Takes priority over font_name_small.

font_name_small.description: Font name from the available font library for small text. Ignored if font_file_small is provided.

style_reference_images.description: A set of images to use as style references (maximum total size 10MB across all style references). The images should be in JPEG, PNG or WebP format.

reference_asset_images.description: A set of asset images (e.g., logos, icons) to use as references for detection and replacement (maximum 10 images). The images should be in JPEG, PNG or WebP format.

flat_graphic_image.description: The flat graphic image to process for text detection and correction. The image should be in JPEG, PNG or WebP format (max size 10MB).

prompt.description: An optional prompt to describe the image. If not provided, a prompt will be auto-generated from the image via captioning.

font_file_h1.description: Custom font file for H1 (heading) text. Supported formats .ttf, .otf, .woff, .woff2 (max 5MB). Takes priority over font_name_h1.

font_name_h1.description: Font name from the available font library for H1 text. Ignored if font_file_h1 is provided.

font_file_h2.description: Custom font file for H2 (subheading) text. Supported formats .ttf, .otf, .woff, .woff2 (max 5MB). Takes priority over font_name_h2.

font_name_h2.description: Font name from the available font library for H2 text. Ignored if font_file_h2 is provided.

font_file_body.description: Custom font file for body text. Supported formats .ttf, .otf, .woff, .woff2 (max 5MB). Takes priority over font_name_body.

font_name_body.description: Font name from the available font library for body text. Ignored if font_file_body is provided.

font_file_small.description: Custom font file for small/caption text. Supported formats .ttf, .otf, .woff, .woff2 (max 5MB). Takes priority over font_name_small.

font_name_small.description: Font name from the available font library for small text. Ignored if font_file_small is provided.

reference_asset_images.description: A set of asset images (e.g., logos, icons) to use as references for detection and replacement (maximum 10 images). The images should be in JPEG, PNG or WebP format.

prompt.description: The prompt to use to generate the image.

seed.description: Random seed. Set for reproducible generation.
seed.title: Seed

negative_prompt.description:
Description of what to exclude from an image. Descriptions in the prompt take precedence
to descriptions in the negative prompt.

custom_model_uri.description:
A custom model URI in the format model/<model_name>/version/<version_name>. 
When provided, the model version and style will be resolved from this URI, and style_type is not required.
A model must be able to generate transparent background to be used for this endpoint.

image.description: The image to remix binary (max size 10MB); only JPEG, WebP and PNG formats are supported at this time.

prompt.description: The prompt to use to generate the image.

negative_prompt.description:
Description of what to exclude from an image. Descriptions in the prompt take precedence
to descriptions in the negative prompt.

custom_model_uri.description:
A custom model URI in the format model/<model_name>/version/<version_name>. 
When provided, the model version and style will be resolved from this URI, and style_type is not required.

style_reference_images.description: A set of images to use as style references (maximum total size 10MB across all style references). The images should be in JPEG, PNG or WebP format.

character_reference_images.description: Generations with character reference are subject to the character reference pricing. A set of images to use as character references (maximum total size 10MB across all character references), currently only supports 1 character reference image. The images should be in JPEG, PNG or WebP format.

character_reference_images_mask.description: Optional masks for character reference images. When provided, must match the number of character_reference_images. Each mask should be a grayscale image of the same dimensions as the corresponding character reference image. The images should be in JPEG, PNG or WebP format.

image.description: The image being edited (max size 10MB); only JPEG, WebP and PNG formats are supported at this time.

mask.description: A black and white image of the same size as the image being edited (max size 10MB). Black regions in the mask should match up with the regions of the image that you would like to edit; only JPEG, WebP and PNG formats are supported at this time.

prompt.description: The prompt used to describe the edited result.

custom_model_uri.description:
A custom model URI in the format model/<model_name>/version/<version_name>. 
When provided, the model version and style will be resolved from this URI, and style_type is not required.

style_reference_images.description: A set of images to use as style references (maximum total size 10MB across all style references). The images should be in JPEG, PNG or WebP format.

character_reference_images.description: Generations with character reference are subject to the character reference pricing. A set of images to use as character references (maximum total size 10MB across all character references), currently only supports 1 character reference image. The images should be in JPEG, PNG or WebP format.

character_reference_images_mask.description: Optional masks for character reference images. When provided, must match the number of character_reference_images. Each mask should be a grayscale image of the same dimensions as the corresponding character reference image. The images should be in JPEG, PNG or WebP format.

image.description: The image containing a person wearing clothing to be modified (max size 10MB); only JPEG, WebP and PNG formats are supported at this time.

prompt.default: Person wearing this piece of clothing
prompt.description: The prompt describing the desired clothing change. Defaults to "Person wearing this piece of clothing" if omitted or empty.
prompt.example: Change his shirt to a pink shirt

product_reference_images.description: An image to use as the product reference for the try-on (exactly 1 image required). The image should be in JPEG, PNG or WebP format.

image.description: The image being reframed (max size 10MB); only JPEG, WebP and PNG formats are supported at this time.

style_reference_images.description: A set of images to use as style references (maximum total size 10MB across all style references). The images should be in JPEG, PNG or WebP format.

image.description: The image whose background is being replaced (max size 10MB); only JPEG, WebP and PNG formats are supported at this time.

prompt.description: The prompt describing the desired new background.

style_reference_images.description: A set of images to use as style references (maximum total size 10MB across all style references). The images should be in JPEG, PNG or WebP format.

image_file.description: An image binary (max size 10MB); only JPEG, WebP and PNG formats are supported at this time.

another_image_file.description: An image binary (max size 10MB); only JPEG, WebP and PNG formats are supported at this time.

RemixImageRequest.description: A request to generate an image from a source image and a provided caption, provided images are cropped to match the chosen output aspect ratio.

image_file.description: An image binary (max size 10MB); only JPEG, WebP and PNG formats are supported at this time.
The image being reframed (max size 10MB); only JPEG, WebP and PNG formats are supported at this time.
An image binary (max size 10MB); only JPEG, WebP and PNG formats are supported at this time.

example.prompt: A serene tropical beach scene. Dominating the foreground are tall palm trees with lush green leaves, standing tall against a backdrop of a sandy beach. The beach leads to the azure waters of the sea, which gently kisses the shoreline. In the distance, there is an island or landmass with a silhouette of what appears to be a lighthouse or tower. The sky above is painted with fluffy white clouds, some of which are tinged with hues of pink and orange, suggesting either a sunrise or sunset.

prompt.description: The prompt to use to generate the image.
prompt.example: A serene tropical beach scene. Dominating the foreground are tall palm trees with lush green leaves, standing tall against a backdrop of a sandy beach. The beach leads to the azure waters of the sea, which gently kisses the shoreline. In the distance, there is an island or landmass with a silhouette of what appears to be a lighthouse or tower. The sky above is painted with fluffy white clouds, some of which are tinged with hues of pink and orange, suggesting either a sunrise or sunset.

TextSpanV3.description: An atomic text segment within a text item, carrying text content and visual styling.

text.description: The text content for this segment. Line breaks within the span are represented as \n.

font_fx.description:
Ordered list of style effects applied to this text span.
This is the primary style field for layered text.

color.description: The hex color of the text (e.g. "#FF0000" for red).

TextSpanV3.title: TextSpanV3

TextItemV3.description: A single text block within a container, representing one logical unit of text (e.g., a headline, a paragraph, a list entry).

x.description: The x coordinate of the item in pixels.
x.title: x

y.description: The y coordinate of the item in pixels.
y.title: y

width.description: The width of the item in pixels.
width.title: width

height.description: The height of the item in pixels.
height.title: height

alignment.description: The text alignment of the item.

angle.description: The angle rotation of the text, measured clockwise in degrees.

font_file.description: The matched font file for this item.

font_candidates.description: A list of alternate matching font files for this item.
font_candidates.title: font_candidates

font_size.description: The font size in points. Null for non-editable items.
font_size.title: font_size

line_height.description: The line height multiplier (e.g., 1.2). Null for non-editable items.
line_height.title: line_height

spans.description: Ordered list of text spans. Concatenating span text values produces the full item text.
spans.title: spans

redacted_api_key.description: A redacted text snippet of the API key. Contains the first 4 characters of the API key
redacted_api_key.title: redacted_api_key

creation_time.description: The date at which the API key was created
creation_time.title: creation_time

user_suggestions.description: List of user suggestions for the organization
user_suggestions.title: user_suggestions

display_handle.description: The display handle of the user
display_handle.title: display_handle

joined.description: Whether the user has already joined the organization
joined.title: joined

profile_pic.description: URL to the user's profile picture
profile_pic.title: profile_pic

name.description: The full name of the user
name.title: name

display_handle.description: The display handle/username of the member
display_handle.title: display_handle

email_address.description: The email address of the member
email_address.title: email_address

avatar_url.description: URL to the member's avatar image
avatar_url.title: avatar_url

full_name.description: User's full name if entered through user profile.
full_name.title: full_name

api_key.description: The API key to use when making authenticated requests with the API. This key will only be shown once.
api_key.title: api_key

api_key_id.description: The ID of the API key. A URL safe base64 encoded UUID
api_key_id.title: api_key_id

creation_time.description: The time at which the API key was created
creation_time.title: creation_time

api_keys.description: List of API keys associated with the organization
api_keys.title: api_keys

results.description: List of results for each member operation
results.title: results

success.description: Whether the operation was successful for this member
success.title: success

message.description: A message describing the outcome of the operation for this member
message.title: message

members.description: List of organization members to add
members.title: members

LiteOrganizationMember.description: A lite representation of an organization member with optional fields for identification

display_handle.description: The display handle/username of the member
display_handle.title: display_handle

email_address.description: The email address of the member
email_address.title: email_address

LiteOrganizationMember.title: LiteOrganizationMember

members.description: List of organization members to remove
members.title: members

members.description: List of organization members to promote to OWNER role
members.title: members

start_time.description: The start time of the invoice period
start_time.title: start_time

end_time.description: The end time of the invoice period
end_time.title: end_time

issued_time.description: The date when the invoice was issued
issued_time.title: issued_time

line_items.description: A list of line items within the invoice
line_items.title: line_items

datasets.description: List of datasets for the authenticated user.
datasets.title: datasets

user_id.description: ID of the user who owns this collection.
user_id.title: user_id

sharing.description: Sharing details for this collection including the owner entry.
sharing.title: sharing

failure_count.description: Number of images that failed to upload.
failure_count.title: failure_count

failed_assets.description: Details of assets that failed to upload.
failed_assets.title: failed_assets

file_name.description: Original filename of the uploaded image.
file_name.title: file_name

file_name.description: Original filename of the failed image.
file_name.title: file_name

DatasetAssetFailureReason.description: Reason why an asset failed to upload.
DatasetAssetFailureReason.title: DatasetAssetFailureReason

files.description: Image files (JPEG, PNG, WebP), .txt caption sidecar files, and/or ZIP archives containing images and captions. Caption .txt files are matched to images by filename stem (e.g. sunset.txt provides the caption for sunset.jpg).

model_id.description: Unique identifier of the created model.
model_id.title: model_id

dataset_id.description: Identifier of the dataset used for training.
dataset_id.title: dataset_id

training_status.description: Current training status of the model.
training_status.title: training_status

model_name.description: Name for the trained model. Must be 5-30 characters, alphanumeric with spaces and hyphens allowed.
model_name.title: model_name

training_steps.description: Number of training steps. Must be between 100 and 20000 and a multiple of 100. Defaults to 1000.
training_steps.title: training_steps

lora_rank.description: LoRA rank for model training. Must be one of 64, 128, or 256. Defaults to 128. Note: lora_rank > 128 requires num_chips >= 32.
lora_rank.title: lora_rank

num_chips.description: Number of TPU chips to use. Must be one of 16 or 32.
num_chips.title: num_chips

ema.description: Exponential moving average decay rate. Must be greater than 0.
ema.title: ema

learning_rate.description: Learning rate for the optimizer. Must be greater than 0.
learning_rate.title: learning_rate

model_id.description: Unique identifier for the model (base64 URL-safe encoded UUID).
model_id.title: model_id

custom_model_uri.description:
A custom model URI in the format model/<model_name>/version/<version_name>.
Use this URI when generating images with this model. Only present for models
that have been registered in the model registry.
custom_model_uri.title: custom_model_uri

dataset_id.description: ID of the dataset (collection) the model was trained from.
dataset_id.title: dataset_id

last_update_time.description: When the model was last updated.
last_update_time.title: last_update_time

is_available_for_generation.description: Whether the model is available for image generation.
is_available_for_generation.title: is_available_for_generation

is_owned.description: Whether the authenticated user owns this model.
is_owned.title: is_owned

training_runs.description: Training run history. Only populated on the get-by-ID endpoint and only for owned models.
training_runs.title: training_runs

ModelStatus.description: The status of a custom model.
ModelStatus.title: ModelStatus

TrainingRun.description: A training run for a custom model.

training_run_id.description: Unique identifier for the training run.
training_run_id.title: training_run_id

creation_time.description: When the training run was created.
creation_time.title: creation_time

last_update_time.description: When the training run was last updated.
last_update_time.title: last_update_time

TrainingRun.title: TrainingRun

TrainingRunStatus.description: The status of a training run.
TrainingRunStatus.title: TrainingRunStatus

text.description: The generated description for the provided image.
text.example: A meticulously illustrated cat with striped patterns, sitting upright. The cat's eyes are a captivating shade of yellow, and it appears to be gazing intently at something. The background consists of abstract, swirling patterns in shades of black, white, and beige, creating an almost fluid or wavy appearance. The cat is positioned in the foreground, with the background elements fading into the distance, giving a sense of depth to the image.
text.title: text

DescribeModelVersion.description: The model version to use for describing images. Defaults to V_3.
DescribeModelVersion.title: DescribeModelVersion

MagicPromptOption.description: Determine if MagicPrompt should be used in generating the request or not.
MagicPromptOption.title: MagicPromptOption

NumImages.description: The number of images to generate.
NumImages.title: NumImages

Seed.description: Random seed. Set for reproducible generation.
Seed.title: Seed

StyleType.description: The style type to generate with; this is only applicable for models V_2 and above and should not be specified for model versions V_1.
StyleType.title: StyleType

AspectRatioV3.description: The aspect ratio to use for image generation, which determines the image's resolution. Cannot be used in conjunction with resolution. Defaults to 1x1.
AspectRatioV3.title: AspectRatioV3

ColorPaletteWithPresetNameOrMembers.description: A color palette for generation, must EITHER be specified via one of the presets (name) or explicitly via hexadecimal representations of the color with optional weights (members). Not supported by V_1, V_1_TURBO, V_2A and V_2A_TURBO models.
ColorPaletteWithPresetNameOrMembers.title: ColorPaletteWithPresetNameOrMembers

ColorPaletteWithMembers.description: A color palette represented only via its members. Cannot be used in conjunction with preset name.

members.description:
A list of ColorPaletteMembers that define the color palette. Each color palette member
consists of a required color hex and an optional weight between 0.05 and 1.0 (inclusive).
It is recommended that these weights descend from highest to lowest for the color hexes provided.
members.title: ColorPaletteMembers

ColorPaletteWithMembers.title: ColorPaletteWithMembers

ColorPaletteMembers.description:
A list of ColorPaletteMembers that define the color palette. Each color palette member
consists of a required color hex and an optional weight between 0.05 and 1.0 (inclusive).
It is recommended that these weights descend from highest to lowest for the color hexes provided.
ColorPaletteMembers.title: ColorPaletteMembers

ColorPaletteMember.description: A member of a color palette.

color_hex.description: The hexadecimal representation of the color with an optional chosen weight.
color_hex.title: color_hex

color_weight.description: The weight of the color in the color palette.
color_weight.title: color_weight

ColorPaletteMember.title: ColorPaletteMember

StyleCodes.description: A list of 8 character hexadecimal codes representing the style of the image. Cannot be used in conjunction with style_reference_images or style_type.

StyleCode.description: The 8 character hexadecimal representation of the style code.

StyleTypeV3.description: The style type to generate with.
StyleTypeV3.title: StyleTypeV3

StylePresetV3.description: A predefined style preset that applies a specific artistic style to the generated image.
StylePresetV3.title: StylePresetV3

UpscaleFactor.description: Upscale the initially generated image by the given factor. Upscale factors other than X1 will incur additional cost.
UpscaleFactor.title: UpscaleFactor

Resolution.description: (For model_version for 2.0 only, cannot be used in conjunction with aspect_ratio) The resolution to use for image generation, represented in width x height. If not specified, defaults to using aspect_ratio.
Resolution.title: Resolution

AspectRatio.description: (Cannot be used in conjunction with resolution) The aspect ratio to use for image generation, which determines the image's resolution. Defaults to ASPECT_1_1.
AspectRatio.title: AspectRatio

FreeformResolution.description: Output resolution, only used if operations alters image dimensions, such as upscale, crop etc.
FreeformResolution.title: FreeformResolution

currency_code.description: The ISO 4217 currency code for the price object.
currency_code.title: currency_code

amount.description: The amount of the currency in the common denomination. For example, in USD this is cents.
amount.title: amount

AssetIdentifier.description: An identifier for an ideogram asset.
AssetIdentifier.title: AssetIdentifier

updated_time.description: When this sharing entry was last updated.
updated_time.title: updated_time

SharingPermission.description: Permission level for the shared organization. OWNER is read-only and cannot be set via add/remove.
SharingPermission.title: SharingPermission

publishing_disabled.description: Whether publishing is disabled for this organization.
publishing_disabled.title: publishing_disabled

OrganizationRoleEnum.description: Role of a user in an organization.
OrganizationRoleEnum.title: OrganizationRoleEnum

image_url.description: The URL of the generated image.
image_url.title: image_url

ApiKeyAuth.description: API key for access control. Use in the header with the name \"Api-Key\"
ApiKeyAuth.name: Api-Key
